name: What is IT Governance?
snippet:
IT governance refers to a framework, or frameworks, that manages how organizations optimize their use of IT operations to support business objectives.
Information technology (IT) governance refers to a framework, or frameworks, that manages how organizations optimize their use of IT operations to support business objectives.
